title: Compounds for degrading alpha-synuclein aggregates and uses thereof
abstract: The present disclosure provides compounds, compositions and methods useful for the treatment of neurodegenerative diseases, in particular synucleinopathies.
claims: 1. A method to treat synucleinopathy in a subject in need thereof, the method comprising administering to the subject an effective amount of a compound of Formula A, EBM-L-SBM  (Formula A)
